results.title: Node.js version compatibility
results.summary: Node.js 20.12.0 satisfies the minimum supported major version.
results.details: Detected Node.js 20.12.0; IDOA requires Node.js 20+ for the TypeScript CLI runtime.

results.title: FABRIC_CFG_PATH presence
results.details: This environment variable is commonly needed for adapter-specific onboarding checks.
results.suggested_fix: Export FABRIC_CFG_PATH before running diagnostics, for example: export FABRIC_CFG_PATH=./config

results.title: Fabric placeholder readiness
results.details: No adapter-specific environment hints were found. TODO: extend this adapter with deterministic checks for peer/orderer startup artifacts and local network topology.
results.suggested_fix: Set FABRIC_CFG_PATH or FABRIC_SAMPLES_DIR and add expected local Fabric configuration files before deeper adapter checks.
